I need to navigate to a regular webpage first. Let me navigate to Amazon.
Good! I've successfully navigated to Amazon.com. Now I need to search for "Logitech MX Master 3S" in the search bar. Let me click on the search box and enter the search term.

Perfect! The search box is now active and showing previous search suggestions. I can see "logitech mx master 3s" is already in the suggestions (first purple item). Let me click on that suggestion to search for it.
